title: microsciadium tenuifolium
intro: Microsciadium tenuifolium, also known as Chinese celery, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. Microsciadium tenuifolium is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed fresh or dried, and it is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
